channel.title: Personalised on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Personalised on Tech Tracker

item.title: Edvanza - Your personalised career advancement platform using AI.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-mEvTqaXhLNs/Yh5zsh5yL2I/AAAAAAAAJaE/tkv0ycfAl-sYwPy98RD666VeVncUIsDAwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1646162863210725-0.png" alt=""> Everyday millions of people and students around the world learn new skills to get a job, work and earn money, now a days due to modernisation most companies require course completion certificate or degree to verify your skills and give you job based on your performance in test and interview etc. However, some young students who got out of college and people who are looking for job or work don’t know that completion of degree is not enough to get job as now a days companies looking for people who have skills and then degree is considered, for instance Google certification program and pradhan mantri kaushal kendra PMKK in india are such programs which develop skills and prepare students to achieve job.
